/usr/bin/ar qc libmedia_server_mpeg.a  CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-crc32.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-element-descriptor.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-muxer.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-pack-header.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-packet.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-pat.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-pes.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-pmt.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-ps-dec.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-ps-enc.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-psd.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-psm.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-sdt.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-system-header.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-ts-dec.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-ts-enc.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-ts-h264.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-ts-h265.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-ts-h266.c.o CMakeFiles/media_server_mpeg.dir/__/third_party/media-server/libmpeg/source/mpeg-util.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmedia_server_mpeg.a
